title: Autodiff over GPU/f16 tensors + fused activations + native Poincare ops
goal: Keep Eshkol's edge: autodiff (gradient/jacobian/div/curl/laplacian) over GPU/f16 tensors so ORC/curvature routing priors + a self-speculative draft head can be learned on-device. Fused GPU activations (silu/gelu/sigmoid/softmax). Native differentiable Poincare/hyperbolic distance (today hand-rolled from tensor-dot/acosh).
acceptance: gradient through an f16 GPU matmul matches f64 finite-difference within tolerance
fused silu/gelu GPU kernels match elementwise reference
